page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI466 or TLPL457.

Formerly: EDCI466.

TLPL460 Materials and Instruction for Creating Skilled and Motivated Readers, Part | (3 Credits)

Explains the educational research that addresses the acquisition of reading and its underlying processes, including research-based reading instruction and materials. Learn how to create a literacy learning environment that helps diverse learners become skilled and motivated readers through phonemic awareness, phonics, fluency, comprehension, vocabulary, and whole and small-group instructional approaches. Restriction: Must be in Elementary Education program; and junior standing or higher. Or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
